faq_subtitle: Find answers to the most common questions about JanMitra AI.
faq_a1: JanMitra AI is an AI-powered government-tech platform that helps Indian citizens discover and apply for government welfare schemes. Using voice, text, and documents, it evaluates your eligibility and guides you through the application process in your preferred language.
faq_q2: How do I check my eligibility for government schemes?
faq_a2: Click "Start Eligibility Check" on the home page or visit the Eligibility Checker under Services. Fill in your basic details (age, income, occupation, state, category) or upload a document to auto-fill the form. Hit "Check Eligibility" and you will see a list of schemes you qualify for.
faq_a3: Go to "Upload Documents" from the Services page or the home screen. You can drag and drop your Aadhaar Card or Income Certificate (PDF, JPG, or PNG), or click to browse. The AI will automatically extract and pre-fill your details in the Eligibility Form.
faq_a4: Yes. JanMitra AI uses Zero-Trust security architecture with encrypted communication (HTTPS), JWT-based authentication, and no permanent storage of raw documents. All data is processed in compliance with Indian data protection standards.
voice_state_ask: Ask any question in your language
voice_greeting: Hello JanMitra! How can I assist you with government schemes today?
voice_fallback_msg: I am having trouble processing your voice right now. Please tell me which scheme you are interested in?
